package rulecoverage

func PositivePersistenceModelContainsHttpFormOrUriTags() string {
    ruleID := "persistence_model_contains_http_form_or_uri_tags"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Persistence models that are tied to form or URI binding tags."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
